subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the mention of all created things and the description of all contingent beings, befitteth the holy court of the Divine Intended One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر کائنات و وصف ممکنات بساط فرب قدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
